prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your fraternity sorority decisions forward
items: Research and compile a list of 5-8 fraternities or sororities at your school with their core values and membership requirements
Schedule informational meetings with 3-4 current members from different organizations to ask about their experiences
Attend 2-3 public events hosted by different fraternities or sororities to observe their group dynamics and culture firsthand
Create a comprehensive personal values assessment by listing your top 5 priorities for college social life, academic support, and personal growth
